name: civil_infrastructure_clinical_trial_millhaven_ind_col
premise: A Civil Infrastructure response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving civil infrastructure clinical trial millhaven ind col. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as individual vs collective under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Luc Sato
agents.identity: I am Luc Sato, accountable for a defensible call in Civil Infrastructure when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays collective for individual.

agents.name: Sana Berg
agents.identity: I am Sana Berg, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Civil Infrastructure.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so collective isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of individual.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect collective.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Luc Sato must decide under individual vs collective. What does Luc Sato do?
